title: KPMG India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: KPMG India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
